title: Crumbly Adventurous Slovakian Fenugreek Crumble
description: A fermented and crumbly savory dish featuring fenugreek seeds, made with a nut-free approach for adventurous taste testers.

ingredients.name: Chopped Fresh Sage Leaves
ingredients.amount: a few sprigs, extra for garnish

instructions: In a small bowl, combine the fenugreek seeds and almond meal. Stir in apple cider vinegar and honey or agave nectar until evenly combined.
Knead the mixture gently by hand until it becomes crumbly and starts to clump together but does not form a ball.
Fold in chopped sage leaves for extra flavor and texture, ensuring they're evenly distributed throughout the crumble.
